flowSection.body: Modern tools, used in a personal practice. The system works quietly in the background so your visit can be about your health — not paperwork.

stages.label: Before
stages.body: Complete paperwork, history, and insurance on your own device before you arrive. Copays handled up front so check-in is quick.

stages.label: In the room
stages.body: Your physician walks in already familiar with your history. The visit is about you — not catching up on forms.

stages.label: After
stages.body: A short text-message survey gives you a moment to tell us if anything could have gone better — usually within minutes of leaving.

stages.label: Between visits
stages.body: Refills, forms, quick questions, care coordination — handled by secure text with our staff. Or call and reach a familiar voice. Our call tree even gives you the option to text instead.

flowSection.footer: Quiet efficiency. More comfort. More time with your doctor.

priviaSection.body: Vero Beach Adult Medicine is locally owned and physician-led — one of the independent practices that together make up Privia Medical Group, a physician-led ACO and national collective of member practices. We share a simple commitment: raise the standard of primary care, and stay accountable to the patients and communities we serve.
priviaSection.footer: Proud to be part of Privia Medical Group.

vbpSection.body: Vero Beach Pediatrics is a practice with deep community roots — built and maintained by the families who trust it. Since opening in 2022, VBP has stood for excellence in care. Vero Beach Adult Medicine carries those same qualities forward in 2026.

servicesSection.subhead: Primary care that covers your whole health picture — not just the reason you came in today.

ctaStrip.subhead: Most insurance accepted. Book your first appointment online or call us directly.

principles.body: You see the same physician every visit. They know your history, your current medications, and what you discussed last time — because continuity is how good medicine works.
Annual well visits, screenings, and lab reviews are the foundation of this practice — not optional add-ons. We catch problems before they become serious.
Same-day sick visits, direct callbacks, and a front desk that knows your name and your story. The kind of care families have come to expect.

positioning.body1: Dr. Wije has cared for this community's children since 1976. In 2022 the practice continued as Vero Beach Pediatrics. Vero Beach Adult Medicine was built for those same families — now grown — along with the professionals, retirees, and working adults who make Vero Beach home.
positioning.pullQuote: A real practice. A real doctor. Every visit.
positioning.body2: We practice medicine the way it was meant to work — with continuity. You see the same physician each visit — someone who knows your history and engages with your health over time, not just when something goes wrong.

hero.lede: Vero Beach Adult Medicine is a relationship-based primary care practice built around one idea: that good medicine is proactive, not reactive. We see adult patients for the full picture — annual well visits, preventive screenings, chronic disease management, and acute care — with the same doctor, every time. Quiet, modern tools keep your visit about your health, not paperwork. Most insurance accepted.

trustBar: Same physician · Every visit, every time

homeServices.title: Annual Physicals & Wellness
homeServices.body: Your annual exam includes bloodwork, preventive screenings, immunization review, mental health, and a real conversation about where your health is headed.

homeServices.title: Chronic Condition Management
homeServices.body: Hypertension, diabetes, thyroid, high cholesterol — actively managed by a physician who tracks your trends and adjusts your plan as your health changes.

homeServices.title: Same-Day Sick Visits
homeServices.body: When you're sick, you get in. Direct access to the practice, same-day availability, and a doctor who already knows your history.

homeServices.title: Women's & Men's Health
homeServices.body: Annual exams, hormone health, perimenopause care, and men's wellness — addressed with the same clinical attention we bring to every visit.

homeServices.title: Preventive Screenings & Labs
homeServices.body: In-house labs and evidence-based screening protocols. We order what's appropriate for your age and risk profile — and go over results with you directly.

homeServices.title: Travel & Lifestyle Medicine
homeServices.body: Pre-travel consults, vaccines, and destination-specific guidance. Plus ongoing support for sleep, weight management, and long-term health goals.
